title: The Red Ghost: An Ewok Adventure
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:RedGhost.jpg]] |title=''The Red Ghost:
An Ewok Adventure'' |author=[[Melinda Luke]] |cover artist= |illustrator=[[Deborah Colvin Borgo]] |editor= |publisher=[[Random House]] |early release= |release date=[[1986]]{{BanthaCite|31|Ewoks & Droids: Read All About 'Em}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Softcover |pages=32 |isbn=0394878655 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated series and its accompanying [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|comic series]] to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |series= |preceded by= |followed by=''[[The Ring, the Witch, and the Crystal: An Ewok Adventure]]'' }} '''''The Red Ghost: An Ewok Adventure''''' is a [[1986]] children's book adaptation of the thirteenth episode of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] TV series, entitled "[[Asha (episode)|Asha]]." ==Plot summary== The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] [[Paploo/Legends|Paploo]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], and [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] are out collecting nuts and roots in their [[Hang-glider/Legends|hang gliders]] when they stumble upon King [[Gorneesh/Legends|Gorneesh]] and a band of [[Dulok/Legends|Duloks]] running from something they call "the Red Ghost." The Ewoks investigate and find a netted [[maramu]], a victim of the Duloks' trophy hunting. However, when Teebo attempts to free the animal, a menacing-looking, red-furred Ewok appears with a [[Korrina/Legends|korrina]]. The Ewoks fly away on their gliders. Back at [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], Wicket tells his friend [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] about the encounter. She suspects that the "Red Ghost" may in fact be her long-lost sister, [[Asha/Legends|Asha]], who was thought dead when a [[hanadak]] killed her mother, [[Ra-Lee/Legends|Ra-Lee]]. That night, Kneesaa heads out to find the Ewok she has convinced herself must be her sister. Wicket accompanies her. As the two youngsters journey through the forest, a light snowfall turns to a full storm, and the Ewoks lose their way. Wicket tries to get a better view of the valley from a ledge, but his weight is too great and he nearly falls, only to be saved by the red-furred Ewok he had encountered the previous day. Asha and Kneesaa recognize each other, and Asha leads the Bright Tree Ewoks to her home, a cave where she livs with a family of korrinas. Kneesaa tries to convince Asha to return home, but her sister insists that she must first stop the Duloks from harming the animals of the valley. The next morning, Wicket and Kneesaa find Asha in the midst of Gorneesh and his Duloks, once again on the hunt. She frees their quarry, defeats the Duloks, and orders them to never hunt again in the area. The Ewoks and the korrinas travel to Bright Tree Village, where Asha is reunited with her father, Chief [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]]. The village then holds a celebration. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Red Ghost: An Ewok Adventure}} {{App |characters= *[[Asha/Legends|Asha]] *[[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] *[[Gorneesh/Legends|Gorneesh]] *[[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] *[[Latara/Legends|Latara]] *[[Malani]] *[[Paploo/Legends|Paploo]] *[[Ra-Lee/Legends|Ra-Lee]] {{Flash}} *[[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] *[[Umwak]] *[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] |species= *[[Dulok/Legends|Dulok]] *[[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] *[[Hanadak]] {{Mo}} *[[Korrina/Legends|Korrina]] *[[Maramu]] *[[Munyip/Legends|Munyip]] |locations= *[[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] **[[Dulok Swamp]] {{Mo}} **[[Happy Grove/Legends|Happy Grove]] ***[[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] |vehicles= *[[Hang-glider/Legends|Hang-glider]] |misellanea= *[[Cage]]s *[[Drum/Legends|Drums]] {{Mo}} *[[Hammock]]s *[[Hut]]s *[[Net/Legends|Nets]] |organisms= *[[Maramu]] *[[Munyip/Legends|Munyip]] *[[Korrina/Legends|Korrina]] }} ==Sources== *{{BanthaCite|31|Ewoks & Droids: Read All About 'Em}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{EwoksEpisodes}} {{Interlang |ka=წითელი აჩრდილი: ევოკების თავგადასავალი }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Red Ghost An Ewok Adventure, The}} [[Category:Ewok Adventure books]]
